top_signals.title: Apollo and Blackstone raise $35bn in chip financing deal for Anthropic
top_signals.summary: Transaction is one of the largest private credit fundraisings, fuelling the Claude maker’s AI growth plans
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: China’s Xi vows boosted ties with Kim, but avoids North Korea nuclear issue
top_signals.summary: Chinese leader Xi Jinping stressed China's "firm commitment to safeguarding the shared interests of the two countries" during a rare summit with North Korea's Kim Jong Un.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
